query: SELECT * FROM autonomous_actions WHERE status IN ('pending_approval', 'pending') LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R3ugynrRDzjYQU.e9d0c4c091a8 --database A5GjFitCrpqWQ2wnoTJiWm --execute SELECT * FROM autonomous_actions WHERE status IN ('pending_approval', 'pending') LIMIT 20;

rows.title: Email Nurture: 12 Anniversary Giveaway Leads
rows.description: 12 conversions from the Anniversary Giveaway campaign. Recommend sending a 3-part nurture email sequence: (1) Welcome + giveaway details, (2) Facility tour invitation, (3) Membership offer.
rows.expectedImpact: Email nurture sequences typically convert 15-25% of leads. Could yield 2-3 new memberships from 12 leads.

rows.title: Follow-up Email: 5 Trial Session Converters
rows.description: 5 trial session sign-ups detected. Recommend sending post-trial follow-up email with membership conversion offer (first month 50% off).
rows.expectedImpact: Post-trial offers typically convert 20-30% of trial users. Could yield 1-2 new memberships.

rows.title: Increase Budget for High-Performing Anniversary Giveaway
rows.description: This campaign is performing exceptionally well with a high ROAS of 4.2x. Increasing the daily budget should help capture more conversions at a similar efficiency.

rows.title: Refine Targeting for Trial Session Campaign
rows.description: The CTR for this campaign is relatively low (1.50%) compared to others, suggesting the audience might not be highly engaged. Refining targeting could improve relevance and efficiency.
rows.expectedImpact: Improve CTR, reduce CPC, and increase conversion rate.

rows.title: Increase Budget for High-Performing Anniversary Giveaway
rows.description: The Anniversary Giveaway campaign is performing exceptionally well with a ROAS of 4.2x. Increasing the daily budget could lead to more conversions and higher revenue.
rows.expectedImpact: Increased conversions and revenue due to higher reach for a successful campaign.

rows.title: Refine Targeting for Trial Session Campaign
rows.description: The Trial Session campaign has a relatively low CTR (1.50%) and a decent ROAS (2.8x), indicating that while it's converting, the audience might not be fully engaged. Refining the audience targeting could improve engagement and conversion efficiency.
rows.expectedImpact: Improved CTR and potentially higher conversion rates by reaching a more relevant audience.

rows.title: Increase Budget for High-Performing Anniversary Giveaway
rows.description: This campaign is performing very well with a ROAS of 4.2x and a low CPC of $0.29. Increasing the budget is likely to yield more conversions at a good return.

rows.title: Refine Targeting for Trial Session Campaign
rows.description: The CTR of 1.50% is relatively low, indicating that the audience might not be highly engaged with the ad creative or offer. Refining the targeting could improve relevance and click-through rates.
rows.expectedImpact: Improved CTR, reduced CPC, and higher conversion rate.

rows.title: Increase Budget for High-Performing Anniversary Giveaway
rows.description: The Anniversary Giveaway campaign is performing exceptionally well with a ROAS of 4.2x. Increasing the daily budget could lead to more conversions and higher revenue.

rows.title: Refine Targeting for Trial Session Campaign
rows.description: The CTR for this campaign is relatively low at 1.50% compared to others, suggesting the audience might not be highly engaged. Refining the targeting could improve relevance and efficiency.
rows.expectedImpact: Improved CTR, reduced CPC, and higher conversion rate

rows.title: Increase Budget for High-Performing Anniversary Giveaway
rows.description: This campaign is performing exceptionally well with a ROAS of 4.2x and a low CPC of $0.29. Increasing the daily budget should capitalize on this success and drive more conversions.

rows.title: Refine Targeting for Trial Session Campaign
rows.description: The Trial Session campaign has a lower CTR (1.50%) compared to other active campaigns, suggesting the audience might not be as engaged. Refining targeting could improve relevance and efficiency.
rows.expectedImpact: Increased CTR, lower CPC, and improved conversion rate.
